headline: Is Cardinal Health (CAH) Still Undervalued As Specialty Growth Lifts Expectations?
summary: Cardinal Health’s recent performance and growth drivers Cardinal Health (CAH) has attracted fresh attention after entering the second half of 2026 with momentum tied to broad pharmaceutical demand and faster growth in its specialty businesses. For investors, the key question is how durable these drivers might prove. Specialty pharmaceuticals sit at the center of this story, with Cardinal Health benefiting from demand for oncology therapies, GLP-1 products, and branded medicines. Recent...
